title: Locating a board linked to a form
excerpt:
Hey folks, 
I have a link to a form but I don’t know which board the form is linked to. Is there anyway  for figure this out without going through every board one at a time and comparing the URL? 
Thanks a lot!

posts.author: NLI_admin (Lewis)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey folks,

I have a link to a form but I don’t know which board the form is linked to. Is there anyway for figure this out without going through every board one at a time and comparing the URL?

Thanks a lot!

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Lewis,

Reached out to you via DM

posts.author: rb101182 (Rachel Burke)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi Bianca - I have the same question. Can you DM me the answer also?

posts.author: ingridbee (Ingrid Berendt)
posts.cookedHtml: Can you please post the solution instead of DMing people so we can call know the answer? I am having the same problem finding the form to board link.

posts.author: jandrews (Janae)
posts.cookedHtml:
I am in the same boat–if the answer could be posted it would be great for the benefit of the community.
Thanks!

posts.author: sspangler (Sarah S)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey @BiancaT - would love an answer here. I am having the same problem.

posts.author: alrobjack (Alex)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi Bianca I have access to a Form but I do not know which board the Form - or its results - link to… Please can you advise me on how I find this out? Thanks

posts.author: shannon-cxmonday (Shannon Thao)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey everyone! Shannon here with the monday team. I just posted a shortcut for locating a form’s board on Alex’s post here that you can check out: How can I find the Board that links to the Form that I have access to? - #2.

Let me know if you have any follow-up questions.

posts.author: MelissaC1 (Melissa)
posts.cookedHtml: Hello! New to Monday! I have the opposite issue. I have a board that captures users submissions. The board is not a form board, I can’t find where the form is? can you point me in the right direction please ?
